releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
I made a new release of the Obsidian Supernote plugin today with new dark mode support which inverts the colors on notes for easier reading in low light situations. Also included are some new settings to minimize the number of UI elements when viewing a note, and optionally hiding recognized text (#25).

This also includes a bugfix for page ordering for notes over 10 pages. #21 

If you can't get the new dark mode to work please try removing the plugin and reinstalling. For some reason on my macOS machine Obsidian wasn't picking up the new CSS after an upgrade-  only after a reinstall.


Thanks for the support everyone. This plugin now has over 1,000 installs! Make it 1025 by installing from here: https://obsidian.md/plugins?id=supernote

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Address feedback from Obsidian official review https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/3314

["fundingUrl": "https://signal.org/donate/",](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/manifest.json#L9)
The expectation for the funding url is that users can donate to you as a developer, not to some other unrelated project.
What you can do is put some text into your README explaining that you don't accept donations and that all donations should go to signal instead, then link to that here.

["minAppVersion": "0.15.0",](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/manifest.json#L5)
You are using newer API's, set this to the latest public build number.

[import * as path from 'path';](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/main.ts#L3)
Remove this unused import.

[text: "Attach Markdown to Vault",](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/main.ts#L116), [text: "Attach Markdown and Images to Vault",](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/main.ts#L125), [atoc.createEl("h2", { text: "Table of Contents" });](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/main.ts#L136), [text: "Save Image to Vault",](https://github.com/philips/supernote-obsidian-plugin/blob/0f8bc55c753c8b979cb3ff74402518c2f20af003/main.ts#L169)
[Use sentence case in UI](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Use+sentence+case+in+UI)

releases.author: philips
releases.description:
This new v2 of the plugin removes the automatic creation of markdown files and PNGs and introduces a new native view of notes inside of Supernote without conversion. 

Video demo here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tEoW35fYVew

📝 View Supernote *.note files in your Obsidian Vault. You can link to these notes from your Markdown notes too [My Note](example.note).

➡️ Export Supernote *.note files as PNGs and/or markdown files and attach them to your Vault.

releases.author: philips
releases.description:
add Insert Supernote mirror image command 

- 📺 Copies an image from a Supernote via [screen mirroring](https://support.supernote.com/en_US/organizing-managing/1791924-screen-mirroring) into your current note with the "Insert Supernote mirror image" command ([demo video](https://youtu.be/Ih_NW-z_aLw))
